It\'s those last sort of residual things that I\'m, you know,

There is the most, some of the most basic, definite, not definition, but

We. We passively put it out there. It\'s just out there. And then
someone finds us because they\'re interested. Outbound. So that\'s
inbound because they\'re coming in outbound. Is. Is we actually target
